text: oh so THATS why my keys are always unmounted in the console
people still index by array position? have fun with that when your data structure changes
wait what do you mean change
if the order of your items isn't guaranteed you're gonna have a bad time when you try to update or delete stuff
i mean it works fine until it doesnt
the real trick is using a stable ID from your database instead of the index
ok but what if the api doesnt give me an id
then you map it to one yourself or cry
i remember debugging a list that kept re-ordering itself because i used the index as a key and the state was shifting
